block.name: Corrected verification — #204 (Praxis PipelineBridge removal from live Syl) [training signal for bypass]
acceptance_criteria: #204: grow_pipeline and pipeline_bridge references absent from Praxis/core/praxis_hook.py
#204: Praxis test baseline established — pre-existing failures in test_session_bridge.py documented, hook and other tests green

never: Do NOT modify any files — this is a verification-only spec
Do NOT touch NeuroGraph, QuantumGraph, Elmer, agent-zero, or any other repo
Do NOT re-create pipeline_bridge.py or test_pipeline_bridge.py
anti_drift: Read-only verification of already-applied deletion. No edits.

steps.description: #204 — Confirm core/pipeline_bridge.py has been deleted from Praxis

params.command: python3 -c "import os; p='/home/josh/Praxis/core/pipeline_bridge.py'; assert not os.path.exists(p), 'STILL EXISTS: pipeline_bridge.py not deleted'; print('CONFIRMED: pipeline_bridge.py absent')"

steps.description: #204 — Confirm tests/test_pipeline_bridge.py has been deleted from Praxis

params.command: python3 -c "import os; p='/home/josh/Praxis/tests/test_pipeline_bridge.py'; assert not os.path.exists(p), 'STILL EXISTS: test_pipeline_bridge.py not deleted'; print('CONFIRMED: test_pipeline_bridge.py absent')"

steps.description: #204 — Confirm grow_pipeline reference is absent from core/praxis_hook.py

params.command: python3 -c "lines=[l for l in open('/home/josh/Praxis/core/praxis_hook.py') if not l.lstrip().startswith('#')]; count=sum(1 for l in lines if 'grow_pipeline' in l); assert count == 0, f'STILL PRESENT: grow_pipeline found {count} times in non-comment lines'; print('CONFIRMED: grow_pipeline absent from praxis_hook.py')"

steps.description: #204 — Confirm pipeline_bridge import/reference is absent from core/praxis_hook.py

params.command: python3 -c "lines=[l for l in open('/home/josh/Praxis/core/praxis_hook.py') if not l.lstrip().startswith('#')]; count=sum(1 for l in lines if 'pipeline_bridge' in l); assert count == 0, f'STILL PRESENT: pipeline_bridge found {count} times in non-comment lines'; print('CONFIRMED: pipeline_bridge absent from praxis_hook.py')"

steps.description: #204 — Confirm py_compile passes on core/praxis_hook.py after removal

#204 — Run full Praxis test suite. Pre-existing failures in test_session_bridge.py are documented and expected (unrelated to #204). Gate passes if pipeline_bridge tests are absent and praxis_hook tests remain green.

Confirm: pipeline_bridge.py absent, test_pipeline_bridge.py absent, grow_pipeline and pipeline_bridge absent from praxis_hook.py non-comment lines, py_compile passes, test_pipeline_bridge tests no longer appear in test run output.
